title: To My God
content:
Oh how oft I wake and find
        I have been forgetting thee!
    I am never from thy mind:
        Thou it is that wakest me.
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To My God"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
